caption: A video conference call features multiple participants in a grid view, showing various people in their home offices or rooms. The participants include men and women of different ages; some wear glasses, and their attire ranges from casual t-shirts and button-down shirts to more formal wear. Several individuals are seen talking, gesturing with their hands, or listening. In the background of the participants' frames, bookshelves, household furniture, and lamps are visible. On-screen text labels identify some of the participants, including "Jerry Mohulal," "Brianna," "Syal Lalin," and "Aditi Arancan de Vyrcel." As the video progresses, the participants' expressions and postures shift slightly as they interact. One man is seen touching his chin thoughtfully, while another woman appears to be speaking. The overall scene remains a steady video call interface with multiple active video feeds of the participants.
